terms_sec1_p1: Artificial Intelligence Student Collective Madrid (AISC), a university association of Universidad Carlos III de Madrid, headquartered at:
terms_sec1_p2: Avenida de la Universidad, No 30, Campus of the Escuela Politécnica Superior, office 2.3.C05, Leganés, 28911
terms_sec1_p4: AISC is the data controller of the personal data you provide through the registration form.
terms_sec2_title: 2. Data collected and purpose of processing
terms_sec2_p1: When registering for the AISC newsletter, only the following personal data will be requested:
terms_sec2_p2: Purpose: to send information by email about activities, events, talks, workshops, and other initiatives of AISC.
terms_sec2_p3: By accepting these terms and conditions, you expressly consent that AISC may use your email to send you informational communications about our activities and events.
terms_sec3_p1: The legal basis for processing your data is the explicit consent granted by accepting these General Registration Terms and Conditions.
terms_sec4_p1: The data controller will not store your personal data longer than strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it is collected, except when legally required.
terms_sec5_p1: AISC may only communicate personal data to entities or individuals collaborating in organizing activities and events, acting under AISC's instructions and complying with data protection regulations.
terms_sec5_p2: If it is necessary to share data with an external entity for co-organizing an event, this circumstance is included in the consent given when accepting these Terms and Conditions, without needing additional consent.
terms_sec5_p3: Outside these cases, AISC will not share personal data with third parties, except when legally required.
terms_sec6_p1_before: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, and restriction of processing at any time by sending a request to
terms_sec6_p1_after: , along with a copy of a valid ID.
terms_sec7_p1: AISC will adopt the necessary technical and organizational measures to ensure the security and confidentiality of your data, preventing loss or unauthorized access.
terms_sec8_li1: Modify these General Terms and Conditions, informing members through the provided contact means.
terms_sec8_li2: Temporarily suspend or cancel communications or activities for justified reasons or force majeure.
terms_sec8_li3: Deny access to the newsletter to users who do not comply with the established conditions.
terms_sec9_p1: The AISC website may contain links to third-party websites. AISC is not responsible for the privacy or cookie policies applied on those websites. Users are subject to the terms and conditions of each external site.
terms_sec10_p1: By checking the corresponding box and submitting the registration form, you declare that you have read and accepted these General Registration Terms and Conditions.
projects_subtitle: At AISC Madrid we believe in the power of artificial intelligence to transform the world. Our projects reflect our commitment to innovation, education, and positive social impact.
proj_reg_subtitle: Fill out the form to secure your spot in the project.
proj_reg_success: Thank you! You have successfully registered.
proj_reg_err_dup: A registration with this email already exists for this project.
proj_reg_consent: I give my consent for AISC Madrid to store my data for the management of this project.
team_subtitle: Nothing would be possible without the people who make up our team. AISC Madrid brings together students from different fields and ages, fostering a space where creativity and collaboration go hand in hand.
honor_subtitle: People who have been part of AISC Madrid and have left their mark on the community.
